model_specification_line: model = smf.wls('full_time_emp ~ daca_eligible * post_daca + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age**2)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: age_at_immig >= 0 and < 16 (arrived before 16th birthday, DACA requirement)
yrimmig <= 2007 (arrived by 2007, proxy for >= 5 years continuous US residence before DACA)
age_in_2012 in [15, 40] (cohorts spanning the DACA age-31 cutoff: treatment age 15-30, control age 31-40)
year in [2006, 2011] or [2013, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA periods, excluding transition year 2012)
treatment_definition: df['age_in_2012'] <= 30 (age <= 30 as of June 15, 2012, i.e., born after June 15 1981 -- DACA-eligible by the age-31 cutoff)
